flow: → Hero Focus Point (v55-hero-card: '爱企谷·入口广场')
confusion_points: Secondary and context cards both call onOpenPointDetail but have no visual difference between 'detail view' and 'this page not built yet' — user gets fallback toast on all points
Relic manifestation block appears at bottom with no scroll hint — users may miss it entirely
Network murmur text ('记忆网络正在共振') has no semantic relation to any actionable element — users may wonder what it means
dead_clicks: Hero card → onOpenPointDetail → safeNavigate → fallbackTitle '记忆片段暂未开放' (no actual detail page exists)
Secondary cards → onOpenPointDetail → same dead end
Context cards → onOpenPointDetail → same dead end
Explore entry → onOpenExploreMap → fallbackTitle '探索地图暂未开放' (no explore map page)
missing_feedback: No visual feedback when hero card is pressed (no :active state subtle animation for touch)
No loading state between CTA click and fallback toast — feels like nothing happened for ~500ms
World response message fades out after 4s but has no interaction hook — users can't re-read it

flow_breakpoints.description: All 10 scenic point CTAs lead to fallback pages (记忆片段暂未开放)
flow_breakpoints.impact: Core user flow dead-ends after '回应' CTA. User sees toast, cannot proceed further.

flow_breakpoints.description: Explore entry CTA (onOpenExploreMap) leads to fallback (探索地图暂未开放)
flow_breakpoints.impact: Primary navigation path from landing to exploration is blocked.

flow_breakpoints.description: No visible state difference between working and non-working CTAs
flow_breakpoints.impact: User cannot distinguish clickable items that lead to real pages vs. fallback toasts. Erodes trust.

flow_breakpoints.description: Relic manifestation section is below-the-fold with no scroll indicator
flow_breakpoints.impact: If user does not scroll down, relics are invisible. The 2.2s manifestation sequence runs but may never be seen.

flow_breakpoints.description: v55-world-response and v55-memory-dialogue are temporary (fade out after 4-5s) with no way to recall
flow_breakpoints.impact: World-building text is lost if user reads slowly or looks away.

flow_breakpoints.description: v55-network-murmur text is semantically disconnected from page actions
flow_breakpoints.impact: User sees '记忆网络正在共振' but has no concept of what a 'memory network' is or how to interact with it.

flow_breakpoints.description: Journey container uses resonanceField class (v55-journey--low/medium/high) but effects are minimal
flow_breakpoints.impact: The class is set but CSS rules for these are empty or near-invisible. Feature appears broken.

flow_breakpoints.description: Temporal state feedback uses Math.random for message selection — same message may repeat
flow_breakpoints.impact: Return visits may show identical time feedback text, breaking the illusion of a 'living' world.

flow_breakpoints.description: No back-navigation from point detail (it doesn't exist) — but even if it did, there's no return UX
flow_breakpoints.impact: If detail page were built, there is no defined return path to keep the journey context.

ui_confusion_points.description: World manifest has 5 stacked text elements (seal char, realm, whisper, atmosphere, murmur) — high cognitive load on first impression
ui_confusion_points.primary_action_visibility: low — the seal+banner area is visually dense, the actual CTA (explore entry) is below the fold for some screen sizes

ui_confusion_points.description: Explore entry and hero card both have '回应' as CTA text but lead to different actions (map vs detail)
ui_confusion_points.primary_action_visibility: medium — same label for different destinations is ambiguous

ui_confusion_points.description: Context cards (indices 4-9) have no emotion text and no action button — they look non-interactive but are actually tappable
ui_confusion_points.primary_action_visibility: low — users may not realize they can tap context cards

ui_confusion_points.description: Cognitive load: journey container has 4 nested wx:for loops rendering the same array with different wx:if filters — complex DOM structure
ui_confusion_points.cognitive_load_level: medium-high — 3 parallel wx:for renderings of the same data is a performance concern on low-end devices

scenic_points_notes: 10 points cover diverse locations (广场, 林雾, 石阶, 声音, 仰望, 残页, 水面, 风, 碑林, 门)
Each has a unique phenomenon-emotion pair with Eastern poetic tone
Missing: any visual (image/icon) associated with each point — purely text-based
relics_notes: Relic events include symbol, color, material, locationEcho — rich sensory description
Temporal state system (decay/sediment/resonance) gives each relic a sense of history
Missing: relic count is low (only what world_seed_v1.js provides) — may feel sparse on repeat visits
system_notes: World manifestation + memory network + temporal decay creates a consistent 'living world' feeling
The gap between 'world narrative' and 'functional CTAs that go nowhere' breaks immersion

undefined_state_issues.description: If worldSeed.explore_points has fewer than 10 items, requireSeed() returns null and buildPageData still runs — scenicLayers may have missing rhythmItems slots

getTimeMemoryFeedback() uses Math.random on a pooled array — if all arrays are empty (edge case where no triggerType matches and no decay/sediment/resonance thresholds met), pool is ['一段记忆正在凝聚'] which is fine

inconsistent_layout_issues.description: WXSS file has orphaned CSS rules (v55-journey__header-- classes, v55-journey--high/medium/low with near-empty bodies, v55-journey__title/guide) that reference removed WXML elements — dead code adds file size
v55-journey::after gradient fade (bottom) defined twice in the WXSS — once in the old section (~line 555 previous) and once in the new V5.6 section — the latest wins but duplicate exists

blocking_issues_to_resolve: BP-01: Implement at least one real scenic point detail page (merchant-event/detail/index) so the hero CTA produces a real view
BP-02: Implement the explore-map page or redirect hero card to be the primary action instead
BP-03: Add visual state differentiation — gray out / show lock icon on fallback CTAs vs. active CTAs
BP-04: Add scroll hint or auto-scroll to relic manifestation when events are active
recommended_fixes_before_release: Reduce redundant wx:for loops in journey (merge secondary + context into one pass with conditional styling)
Add :active press states to all tappable cards (hero, secondary, context)
Clean up orphaned CSS classes (v55-journey__header, __title, __guide, unused awareness mode selectors)
Replace v55-network-murmur text with something contextually relevant to the visible cards
Add loading spinner/spinner overlay between CTA tap and page navigation
